_doc: Budgets for `npm run perf` (the frame-cost gate). The gate is DATA: relative.* caps judge each zone against the SAME run's town control (machine-independent — a slow laptop slows both sides); absolute.* are generous backstops for outright hitching. gapP50Mul/gapP99Mul multiply the town control's percentile, slackMs adds flat headroom so a tiny control (fast machine, vsync floor) never divides into an impossible cap. Hitch rates are per minute of steady-state walking; hitchGraceCount is the quantization guard — a rate breach additionally needs MORE than this many offending frames in the window, because an 8s window can only express 0 or ≥7.5/min and a single stray OS/driver frame is not 'outright hitching' (a pattern still is: two 70ms frames in 8s = 15/min breaches). entryWorstGapMs caps the zone-load burst.
_docDeterminism: The gate rolls NO dice: `weather` pins the sky (a CLI --weather overrides it and flips the run to non-gating forensics), `mintSeed` seeds each tileset's mint from Rng(mintSeed + its FULL-matrix index — filter-stable, so --filter runs reproduce the full sweep's zones), and `mintPins` forces a tileset's variant and/or layout generator so multi-modal tilesets are judged on their committed WORST CASE instead of whatever the dice serve — heavy scenes are usually a LAYOUT roll (jungle × the sealed-forest roof), not a variant. A pin may also carry `seed` (outranks mintSeed+index) — the worst-case lever for tilesets whose heavy scene is a COUNT roll, not a face; hunt one with the CLI `--seed=<n> --filter=<id>` forensics pair. The matrix itself is registry-derived: frontier-eligible tilesets in registry order, then `perfProbe: true` opt-ins (caves, minted interiors) APPENDED so frontier rows' mint seeds never shift. `relative.controlFloorMs` stops a fast town roll (vsync-off 4.2ms pacing) from halving every cap — the control normalizes the machine, never gambles the headroom.

overrides._retired: forest + jungle rows RETIRED 2026-07-15 by the canopy compositing pass (render/vis/canopy.ts): static veil crowns flatten into chunk slices, palmCrown joined CANOPY_STATIC. Same-mint A/B (perf_20260715172213 vs _172424 ablated): forest 20.8 -> 12.6 p50, jungle tail 25 -> 20.9 p99 (palm bake had already taken jungle's p50 25 -> ~17). Both now hold under the SHARED caps — dropping these rows was the acceptance test the old _todos promised. If forest's honest-combat hitch40 clusters (sim bursts on a walkable base) ever recur across runs, add back a narrow absolute row with fresh evidence, not the old numbers. || marsh + mycelia rows RETIRED 2026-07-16 by the crown/shard bake pass: marsh's pinned worst mint (the row's own evidence zone, Greenscum Lowwater) had already fallen 29.1 -> ~20.8 p50 / 31 p99 under the canopy composite across three same-mint runs — the 'dense pod/reed' debt was mostly its tree roof; mycelia's mushroomCrown joined CANOPY_STATIC (breath -> light.flicker) and the shard family (20 moteless kinds) went bakeWhole, measured on the mushroom-dense fungal_hollow pinned mint 12.4 -> 8.3 p50 (town-flat, perf_20260716013748) and rime_gallery 24.9/44.5/9-hitch -> 20.8/29.1/1 (the first cave gate's breach-class zone). Shared caps hold both with margin; a regression past 28ms p50 gates again on its own.
overrides._note: No override rows are live. A new row needs FRESH same-mint evidence (a report id) and a _todo naming the pass that will retire it.
